problem id: 1e86b3a7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(6) XOR SHR(5)) AND ROT(1)

examples:
  10101001 -> 01000001
  00110011 -> 01000000
  00010011 -> 00000000
  00101010 -> 00000000
  00010100 -> 00000000
  00000000 -> 00000000
  01100010 -> 10000000
  01010111 -> 10000010
  11001000 -> 00000000

query: 11111011
predicted answer: 11000111
